command: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; if [ "${{GC_AGENT_PROVIDER:-openai}}" = "openrouter" ] && [ -n "${{OPENROUTER_API_KEY:-}}" ] && [ -z "${{OPENAI_API_KEY:-}}" ]; then export OPENAI_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY"; fi; codex exec --json --skip-git-repo-check --full-auto {provider_config_args} -C {workspace} -m {model} --add-dir {workspace} -
